title: lepicephalus ciliata
intro: Lepicephalus ciliata, also known as the 'hairy-headed' plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae. It is native to Europe and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Lepicephalus ciliata include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as digestive problems and menstrual cramps. Lepicephalus ciliata is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
